results.compiled_code:
SELECT
  id AS raw_id,

  NULLIF(event->>'instance_id','')::bigint AS instance_id,
  NULLIF(event->>'user_id','')::bigint     AS user_id,
  NULLIF(event->>'database_id','')::bigint AS database_id,
  NULLIF(event->>'query_id','')::bigint    AS query_id,

  NULLIF(event->>'arrival_timestamp','')::timestamptz AS arrival_timestamp,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'compile_duration_ms','')::numeric, 0)   AS compile_duration_ms,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'queue_duration_ms','')::numeric, 0)     AS queue_duration_ms,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'execution_duration_ms','')::numeric, 0) AS execution_duration_ms,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'feature_fingerprint',''), 'UNKNOWN_FINGERPRINT') AS feature_fingerprint,

  NULLIF(event->>'was_aborted','')::boolean AS was_aborted,
  NULLIF(event->>'was_cached','')::boolean  AS was_cached,

  NULLIF(event->>'query_type','') AS query_type,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_permanent_tables_accessed','')::numeric, 0) AS num_permanent_tables_accessed,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_external_tables_accessed','')::numeric, 0)  AS num_external_tables_accessed,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_system_tables_accessed','')::numeric, 0)    AS num_system_tables_accessed,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'mbytes_scanned','')::numeric, 0) AS mbytes_scanned,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'mbytes_spilled','')::numeric, 0) AS mbytes_spilled,

  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_joins','')::numeric, 0)        AS num_joins,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_scans','')::numeric, 0)        AS num_scans,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(event->>'num_aggregations','')::numeric, 0) AS num_aggregations,

  NULLIF(event->>'cluster_size','')::numeric AS cluster_size,

  NULLIF(btrim(event->>'read_table_ids'), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_read,
  NULLIF(btrim(event->>'write_table_ids'), '') IS NOT NULL AS has_write

FROM public.redset_events

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    LAST_VALUE(cluster_size) OVER (
      PARTITION BY instance_id
      ORDER BY arrival_timestamp
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS cluster_size_ffill
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics"."raw_clean"
),
global_median AS (
  SELECT percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cluster_size) AS med
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics"."raw_clean"
)
SELECT
  b.*,
  COALESCE(b.cluster_size, b.cluster_size_ffill, gm.med) AS cluster_size_clean
FROM base b
CROSS JOIN global_median gm

WITH fp_counts AS (
  -- counts across ALL raw data (latest)
  SELECT
    feature_fingerprint AS fp,
    COUNT(*)::bigint AS freq
  FROM "redset_db"."analytics"."cluster_clean"
  GROUP BY 1
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    d.raw_id,

    d.instance_id,
    d.user_id,
    d.database_id,
    d.query_id,

    d.arrival_timestamp,

    d.compile_duration_ms,
    d.queue_duration_ms,
    d.execution_duration_ms,

    d.feature_fingerprint,
    d.was_aborted,
    d.was_cached,

    d.query_type,

    d.num_permanent_tables_accessed,
    d.num_external_tables_accessed,
    d.num_system_tables_accessed,

    d.mbytes_scanned,
    d.mbytes_spilled,

    d.num_joins,
    d.num_scans,
    d.num_aggregations,

    d.cluster_size_clean,

    CASE
      WHEN d.has_read AND d.has_write THEN 'Read/Write'
      WHEN d.has_read THEN 'Read Only'
      WHEN d.has_write THEN 'Write Only'
      ELSE 'System/Metadata'
    END AS workload_type,

    (d.num_permanent_tables_accessed + d.num_external_tables_accessed + d.num_system_tables_accessed)
      AS total_tables_accessed,

    CASE
      WHEN d.num_external_tables_accessed > 0 THEN 'External (Data Lake)'
      WHEN d.num_system_tables_accessed > 0 THEN 'System Internal'
      WHEN d.num_permanent_tables_accessed > 0 THEN 'Core Warehousing'
      ELSE 'Metadata Only'
    END AS access_scope,

    fpc.freq AS fingerprint_frequency,

    CASE
      WHEN fpc.freq >= 100 THEN 'Automated / App'
      WHEN fpc.freq > 5 THEN 'Recurring Report'
      ELSE 'Ad-hoc / Human'
    END AS traffic_source

  FROM "redset_db"."analytics"."cluster_clean" d
  LEFT JOIN fp_counts fpc ON fpc.fp = d.feature_fingerprint

  
    WHERE d.raw_id > (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(raw_id), 0) FROM "redset_db"."analytics"."clean_table")
  
)

SELECT * FROM base
